title.en: Another tens of millions of years have passed.

content.en:
Time flies.

Another tens of millions of years have passed.

"The Eternal Dao Seed has hopefully been created, and if the second-grade Eternal Dao Seed is deduced now, it is estimated that it will be able to be deduced soon, but I must deduce the perfect Eternal Dao Seed!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The difference between the perfect Eternal Dao and the inferior Eternal Dao is not a matter of power, but a matter of defects.

The Eternal Dao Seed under the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed has some flaws and problems to a greater or lesser extent, and of course the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed will definitely be stronger.

However, even if the Eternal Dao Seed has many flaws, once it is successfully condensed, its strength will skyrocket.

Therefore, many Eternal Dao realms want inferior Eternal Dao species and don't care about defects.

"It is probably necessary to deduce 100 million years of the Dao Era, and there is a high probability that you will be able to deduce the perfect Eternal Dao Species!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He was not in a hurry at all, and deduced silently.

But.

this day.

Something happened to Luo Xia Pavilion.

Luoxia Court Headquarters.

Several high-level officials were having a meeting together, and Ye Tian also came.

"Blood Lake Ridge has made a move against our Luoxia Pavilion, and the remaining few industries have been attacked, and Xuanlin Mountain has been breached!" Luo Wushuang said.

She was furious, but now there was nothing she could do.

After all, the Blood Lake Ridge is too powerful, much more powerful than the Tempest Chamber of Commerce.

"Don't leave Roselle City recently!"

Luo Wushuang said.

"Blood Lake Ridge!" Ye Tian guessed that it might be the last time he taught the Eternal Dao powerhouses of Blood Lake Ridge a lesson, causing Blood Lake Ridge to have the idea of doing something to Luo Xia Pavilion.

Of course, it was definitely not the idea that came first, but the idea that came gradually, and now the Eternal Dao Realm of the Blood Lake Ridge agreed to such a decision.

"Leave this matter to me!"

Ye Tian said.

"Ye Tian, the Blood Lake Ridge has three Eternal Dao Realms!" Luo Wushuang hurriedly said.

He was worried that Ye Tian would be more reckless and directly ask for trouble from the Blood Lake Ridge.

In this case, the Eternal Dao Realm of the Blood Lake Ridge may not necessarily care about the rules of the Ancient Realm, and the Eternal Dao Realm may directly attack him.

"Don't worry, I have a way!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Luo Wushuang's original intention was to find a top force as a backer and trade the Jiuhu Mountain token.

But now, Ye Tian said that there was a way, and she was ready to wait.

......

Subsequently.

A copy of Ye Tian's body went to the Blood Lake Ridge for trouble.

In the ancient realm, there are no rules for the fight between the Eternal Dao Realm, as long as you don't kill the Eternal Dao Realm, you will not be punished.

This rule is mainly to protect the Eternal Supreme Dao Genius of some top forces, otherwise they will be assassinated by the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm.

But the battle between the Eternal Dao Realm and the number of falls, the Lord of the Ancient Realm will not care.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the Blood Lake Ridge.

The Blood Lake Ridge occupies a territory as its own territory, and this territory is called the Blood Lake Ridge.

It's a blood-colored lake, with islands in the middle of it, and palaces on it.

In addition, a large number of large arrays were arranged here, all of which were arranged from the Eternal to the Dao Realm.

Ye Tian came to the Blood Lake Ridge and shouted directly: "Get out!"

The sound was loud and shattered the void.

In the Blood Lake Ridge, several Eternal Dao powerhouses recognized Ye Tian.

"It's a late-stage powerhouse of the Eternal Dao Transformation in Luoxia Pavilion, and he hurt us last time!"

An eternal Daoist powerhouse said.

Whew!!!

An Eternal Dao powerhouse came out, but Ye Tian exuded the aura of the Eternal Dao Realm.

Suddenly, these Eternal Daoist powerhouses loosened and retreated one by one.

"Three leaders, please!"

At this time, the three Eternal Dao Realms had already known about it and walked out of the retreat one after another.

The three Eternal Dao Realms of the Blood Lake Ridge surrounded Ye Tian.

"Eternal to the Dao Realm, I didn't expect Luoxia Pavilion to be able to give birth to an Eternal Dao Realm, Your Excellency should have only joined Luoxia Pavilion for a long time, strictly speaking, it has nothing to do with Luoxia Pavilion. However, for the sake of Your Excellency's face, we can not make a move on Luo Xia Pavilion, this is a small matter, how about it?"

It was the Blood Dragon Venerable Lord, the leader of the Blood Lake Ridge, who spoke!

"Forget it?" Ye Tian smiled and said, "If you are dead, then this matter will be over!"

Hearing this, the three Eternal Dao Realms were extremely angry.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian fought with them.

As soon as they fought, the faces of the three of them changed drastically in the Eternal Dao Realm.

Ye Tian's physical body was too terrifying, and the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Rules had reached the Ten Percent Perfection Realm!

Boom!!!

The three Eternal Dao Realms were defeated by a single blow, and one of them, the Eternal Dao Realm, was pierced by Ye Tian's shot like an ant, and his body was instantly shattered and died.

Spike!

The other Eternal Dao Realm was holding an Eternal Dao Divine Weapon spear, casting the Eternal Sequence Dao Divine Power, and instantly came to Ye Tian and stabbed it fiercely.

However.

His spear attack on Ye Tian's body was resisted by one Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao Divine Power, and the Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao rules of the Ten Percent Perfection Realm were too powerful, making it difficult for the opponent's attack to move an inch.

"This spear is very good, I don't have an Eternal Dao Divine Weapon yet!"

Ye Tian smashed the opponent's body with one punch, and then took this Eternal Dao Divine Weapon.

In an instant, the two Eternal Dao Realms fell, and the remaining Eternal Dao Realms trembled.

"Spare your life!"

This Eternal Dao Realm begs for mercy.

However, Ye Tian would not let him go, otherwise he might find trouble for himself, wouldn't it be self-inflicted!

So, the other party must die!

Ye Tian shook his hand, and the dense Eternal Sequence Supreme Dao rules wrapped it layer by layer, and no matter how much the other party fought for it, he couldn't bear Ye Tian's methods.

Boom!

This Eternal Dao Realm was directly pinched and exploded by Ye Tian.

"This Eternal Supreme Dao Realm is too weak!"

Ye Tian muttered.

It seems that in the Ancient Realm, except for the Eternal Dao Realm of the top forces, the Eternal Dao Realm of these small and medium-sized forces are all ordinary Eternal Dao Realms, and they may not be able to defeat the Mythical Spirit of the Mythical Valley.

At this time.

The group of Eternal Daohua and the other members of the Blood Lake Ridge trembled and were terrified.

The three leaders, who were invincible in their eyes, were easily killed by Ye Tian.

What a monster this is!

However, Ye Tian didn't kill them, it didn't matter if he killed the three Eternal Dao Realms, if he killed all of these Eternal Dao Realms, if there was an Eternal Dao Realm report, the Ao Gu Realm would punish him.

He didn't want to get himself in trouble.

So, he left directly and returned to Luoxia Pavilion.

After coming back, Ye Tian said directly: "The problem of the Blood Lake Ridge is solved, they won't trouble Luo Xia Pavilion anymore!"
